title: GetLimitTorque Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function GetLimitTorque (JointNumber As Integer) As Integer
parameters:
JointNumber	Integer expression
		 for the desired joint.
description: Returns the limit torque for the specified joint for the current robot.
see_also:
GetRealTorque, GetRobotPos, LimitTorque

GetLimitTorque Example

VB
examples:
Dim j1LimitTorque As Double
j1LimitTorque = m_spel.GetLimitTorque(1)
